description: Sensitive-surface chain. Security-auditor runs TWICE: as advisor before executor (threat modeling + recommendations) and as gate after code-sanity (validates implementation). For changes touching auth, secrets, crypto, migrations, agent/MCP config, lockfiles, GitHub workflows, permissions. Scrutiny defaults to critical.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (sensitive-surface change; specify auth/secrets/crypto/migration/config aspect)
SCOPE: {{scope}}
NON_GOALS: (fill in)
VALIDATION: (tests + security smoke)
ACCEPTANCE: (functional + security invariants preserved)

Sensitive surface. Security-auditor runs pre (advisor) AND post (gate). Reviewer scrutiny={{scrutiny}}; reviewer may auto-escalate further on surface table match.

steps.title: security-auditor-advisor:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: LOW-permission threat-modeling pass BEFORE executor. Identify attack surface, dependency risks, auth/secret/crypto invariants.
INPUTS: root contract; current code at {{scope}}.
OUTPUTS: structured recommendations for executor — invariants to preserve, tests to add, library/config choices to avoid. Cite CVE/CWE refs where applicable.
SCOPE: {{scope}} and adjacent security boundaries.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no exploits; recommendations only.

steps.title: executor:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: implement root's deliverable per its contract, applying security-auditor-advisor's recommendations.
INPUTS: root contract + security-auditor-advisor's structured recommendations.
OUTPUTS: diff on chain branch satisfying ACCEPTANCE; tests per VALIDATION; security invariants preserved.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no `--no-verify`; no scope creep into adjacent security surfaces unless advisor flagged.

steps.title: code-sanity:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: Iron-style mandatory seconder gate on executor's diff.
INPUTS: executor's diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict OK or FINDINGS.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: security-auditor-gate:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: LOW-permission validation pass AFTER code-sanity. Validate executor's diff against security-auditor-advisor's recommendations + general security review.
INPUTS: executor's diff; security-auditor-advisor's recommendations; code-sanity verdict.
OUTPUTS: verdict OK or FINDINGS (with severity + remediation). Reviewer treats OK as pre-condition for PASS.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no exploits.

steps.title: obligations-scanner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: scan executor's diff for unstructured markers.
INPUTS: executor's diff.
OUTPUTS: CLEAN | OBLIGATIONS_FOUND | BLOCKED.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer at SCRUTINY={{scrutiny}} (critical by default for this template).
INPUTS: executor diff + code-sanity verdict + security-auditor-gate verdict + obligations-scanner output + advisor recommendations + root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + Release Checklist with security-specific items.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits; do not waive security-auditor-gate findings.
